name: summarize_document
description: Retrieve all indexed chunks of a document in order, suitable for full-document summarization. Returns the complete indexed content of a document organized by chunks with their positions. At least one of 'path' or 'document_id' must be provided.

path.description: File path of the document to retrieve chunks for.

document_id.description: UUID of the document to retrieve chunks for.

max_chunks.description: Maximum number of chunks to return. Defaults to 100.
